title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
